title: TeaRAG: A Token-Efficient Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation Framework

defines.name: TeaRAG
defines.definition: A token-efficient agentic RAG framework that reduces both retrieved-content length and reasoning steps while preserving answer accuracy.

problem: Existing agentic RAG systems achieve strong accuracy but incur substantial token overhead from redundant retrieval and overlong reasoning, and their retrieval content is often low-density and noisy.
